title: Soft Idli
description: Soft and fluffy steamed rice cakes served with sambar and two varieties of chutneys.

title: Crispy Dosa
description: Thin and golden-crisp rice crepe served with flavorful sambar and chutneys.

title: Hot Poori
description: Deep-fried fluffy whole wheat bread served with delicious spiced potato masala.

title: Medu Vada
description: Crispy and savory deep-fried black lentil donuts infused with black pepper and curry leaves.

title: South Indian Special Meals
description: A wholesome traditional feast featuring rice, sambar, rasam, kootu, poriyal, appalam, and curd.

title: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Creamy cottage cheese cubes cooked in a rich, spiced tomato-butter gravy.

title: Mushroom Masala
description: Fresh button mushrooms simmered in a semi-dry onion-tomato spiced gravy.

title: Medu Vada
description: Crispy and savory deep-fried black lentil donuts served fresh with coconut chutney.

title: Mini Poori Masala
description: Perfect evening snack of two mini puffed pooris served with warm potato masala.

title: South Indian Parotta
description: Two layered, flaky and crispy flatbreads served with aromatic veg kurma.

title: Ghee Roast Dosa
description: Super thin and crispy crepe drizzled with pure ghee, served with chutney and sambar.
